---
title: "Basant Saud"
subtitle: "Researcher | Veterianrian"
description-meta: "Quarto Academic Website for Basant"
image: files/profiles/basant.png
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:saudbasant.vet@gmail.com 
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vet-basant/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/my-orcid?orcid=0000-0002-9851-1807
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7v5sc4sAAAAJ
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}}"
      aria-label: researchgate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Basant-Saud
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      aria-label: github
      href: https://github.com/saudbasant
      target: _blank
    - icon: youtube
      aria-label: youtube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@basantvet
      target: _blank
---

::: {#hero-heading}
I am Basant Saud, a **Veterinary science** graduate. Currently, I am MS student in the [department of Pathology](https://sau.edu.bd/department/pathology), [Sher-e-Bangla Agricultural University](https://sau.edu.bd/), Bangladesh and Research assistant in the lab of [Amina Khatun, PhD](https://sau.edu.bd/teacher/261).

My research interests are Virology, Immunology, Molecular Epidemiology, Genomics, Transcriptomics, Zoonoses and One health.

:::
